title: Motivational Monday
excerpt: I've run out of pages in my various notebooks, so I switched it up and used a piece of American Crafts cardstock (the smooth side since I will probably scan this). I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I…
body: I've run out of pages in my various notebooks, so I switched it up and used a piece of American Crafts cardstock (the smooth side since I will probably scan this). I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I have finally tried a waterbrush and found one that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
